title: Mikhaylovka Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Mikhaylovka with a Z-Score of +3.46. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mikhaylovka is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 24%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 18.4 km/h. 
 The lack of precipitation and high temperatures are leading to critical conditions, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Mikhaylovka.
